evals.prompt: I just installed agami. Help me connect to my Postgres database.
evals.expected_output: Routes to agami-connect Phase 0 (credential setup). Prompts the user to choose a database type via AskUserQuestion, writes ~/.agami/credentials.example with a Postgres template, and explains how to fill it in. Does NOT skip the DB-type picker, does NOT auto-write real credentials.

evals.prompt: My schema changed yesterday — reload it.
evals.expected_output: Routes to agami-connect reintrospect path. Pulls fresh tables/columns/FKs from information_schema, rebuilds the OSI v0.1.1 model under <artifacts_dir>/<profile>/, runs validate_semantic_model.py before writing, surfaces any validation errors without persisting a broken model.
